title: Implement Pi subagent process runner for tickflow
description: Add a SubagentRuntime that spawns child pi in JSON print mode for a single tick attempt, captures assistant output, tool events when available, exit code, duration, and usage if present. Use temp prompt files where useful and support abort signals.
acceptance_criteria: A test/manual run can spawn a child pi process for a trivial prompt and capture final output plus exit status without hanging.
